headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -45.9)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 43% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 111 quotes and 82 at strong intensity - people are expressing major grievances today.
• The frustration score of 45.9 sits in the upper portion of the 119-day range, indicating well above-average complaint levels.
• Both fears and optimism improved from yesterday but remain notably subdued compared to their historical ranges.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
